mapper.select: SELECT id, supplier_id as "supplierId", order_id as "orderId", state_id as "stateId", order_amount as "orderAmount", commission_amount as "commissionAmount", platform_fee as "platformFee", net_amount as "netAmount", currency, settlement_period_start as "settlementPeriodStart", settlement_period_end as "settlementPeriodEnd", disbursement_reference as "disbursementReference" FROM settlements WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "orderAmount" FROM settlements GROUP BY state_id

SELECT id, supplier_id as "supplierId", order_id as "orderId", state_id as "stateId", order_amount as "orderAmount", commission_amount as "commissionAmount", platform_fee as "platformFee", net_amount as "netAmount", currency, settlement_period_start as "settlementPeriodStart", settlement_period_end as "settlementPeriodEnd", disbursement_reference as "disbursementReference" FROM settlements WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT id, supplier_id as "supplierId", order_id as "orderId", state_id as "stateId", order_amount as "orderAmount", net_amount as "netAmount", currency, settlement_period_start as "settlementPeriodStart", settlement_period_end as "settlementPeriodEnd" FROM settlements WHERE state_id IN ('PENDING', 'CALCULATING', 'CALCULATED', 'APPROVED') AND supplier_id = #{supplierId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT id, supplier_id as "supplierId", order_id as "orderId", state_id as "stateId", order_amount as "orderAmount", commission_amount as "commissionAmount", platform_fee as "platformFee", net_amount as "netAmount", currency, settlement_period_start as "settlementPeriodStart", settlement_period_end as "settlementPeriodEnd", disbursement_reference as "disbursementReference" FROM settlements WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
